mapper.sql: ${tableAlias}.BRANCH_NO = THT.BRANCH_NO AND ${tableAlias}.ACCOUNT_NO = THT.ACCOUNT_NO AND ${tableAlias}.SEARCH_TRADE_S_CD = THT.SEARCH_TRADE_S_CD AND ${tableAlias}.BRAND_CD = THT.BRAND_CD AND ${tableAlias}.FORMAL_BRAND_NAME = THT.FORMAL_BRAND_NAME AND ${tableAlias}.TRADE_DATE = THT.TRADE_DATE AND ${tableAlias}.GET_DATE = THT.GET_DATE AND ${tableAlias}.ORDER_NO = THT.ORDER_NO AND nvl(${tableAlias}.PRICE, 0) = nvl(THT.PRICE, 0) AND nvl(${tableAlias}.NEW_TRADE_PRICE, 0) = nvl(THT.NEW_TRADE_PRICE, 0) AND nvl(${tableAlias}.QUANTITY, 0) = nvl(THT.QUANTITY, 0) AND nvl(${tableAlias}.FEE, 0) = nvl(THT.FEE, 0) AND nvl(${tableAlias}.CONSUMPTION_TAX, 0) = nvl(THT.CONSUMPTION_TAX, 0) AND nvl(${tableAlias}.CAPITAL_GAIN_TAX, 0) = nvl(THT.CAPITAL_GAIN_TAX, 0) AND ${tableAlias}.ACCURATE_AMOUNT = THT.ACCURATE_AMOUNT AND nvl(${tableAlias}.CANCEL_FLG, 0) = nvl(THT.CANCEL_FLG, 0)
